text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
86 
MDCR_I_SNP_MOS 
LABEL: 
Medicare-Medicaid Institutional Special Needs Plan (I-SNP) Months 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medicare 
Special Needs Plan (SNP) for institutional care. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MBSF (derived) 
VALUES: 
0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicare enrollment) 
COMMENT: 
CCW creates this variable by linking the MBSF
